temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A wide shot reveals a massive, multi-story wooden building, possibly a hotel or lodge, completely buried in a thick blanket of snow. The scene is set at night, illuminated by a single streetlamp and the building's own lights, casting long shadows in the deep blue, foggy atmosphere. (Storyline: This establishing shot sets a mysterious and foreboding tone, introducing the primary location of the story.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, building tension.)
(00:03-00:05) A man in a red robe runs frantically down a dimly lit, narrow hallway. He stumbles and looks back in terror before crashing through a wooden door with a loud bang. (Storyline: This scene introduces a character in a state of extreme distress, fleeing from an unseen threat, which immediately establishes a high-stakes, suspenseful situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful score continues, punctuated by the loud, abrupt sound of the door crashing open.)
